title: dasystephana bigelovii
intro: Dasystephana bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's dasystephana or Bigelow's desert marigold, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This desert-dwelling plant is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dasystephana bigelovii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Dasystephana bigelovii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
